metadata.description: Org-design skills for diagnosing organisational and team dysfunctions through open sociotechnical systems theory.

plugins.name: organisational-dysfunction
plugins.description: Diagnose recurring organisational and team dysfunctions (stuck decisions, hollow agile rituals, metric-chasing, disengagement, change that never lands) using open sociotechnical systems theory and the DP1/DP2 design-principle lens.
